allow: Bash(python -c "from app.config import get_settings; s=get_settings\(\); print\(f''SMTP: {s.SMTP_HOST}:{s.SMTP_PORT}, user={s.SMTP_USERNAME}, pwd_set={bool\(s.SMTP_PASSWORD\)}''\)")
Bash(python3 -c "from app.config import get_settings; s=get_settings\(\); print\(f''SMTP: {s.SMTP_HOST}:{s.SMTP_PORT}, user={s.SMTP_USERNAME}, pwd_set={bool\(s.SMTP_PASSWORD\)}''\)")
